query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A solitary leafless tree stands in an open field surrounded by dense fog. The bare branches extend in various directions against a pale sky. The ground appears dry and brown. The tree is positioned slightly to the right of center, and distant landscape features are not visible through the haze. The scene is minimal and quiet.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A solitary leafless tree stands in an open field surrounded by dense fog that smears details and dissolves textures into ambiguity. The image displays muted, faded tones with washed-out grays and desaturated earth colors, while flat lighting eliminates directional shadows and collapses depth. The sparse composition and obscured forms evoke a mood of isolation and atmospheric distress.
